response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced software developer with deep expertise in multiple languages and technologies, including Java, but his background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and Node.js. While his technical skills are strong, his limited recent Java experience (last significant Java work appears to be in 2018) and lack of direct insurance sector experience raise concerns. His German language proficiency is also at a basic level, which may impact client collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple tech stacks, including Java
Strong background in agile methodologies, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies rapidly
concerns: Limited recent Java experience (last significant Java work in 2018)
Basic German language skills may hinder client collaboration
No direct experience in the insurance sector or agile digitalization projects
